title: Open House
description: Explore everything BVC has to offer. Meet advisors, tour our facilities, and discover programs in business, health, technology, community studies, and entertainment arts.

title: Transcript Submission Deadline
description: Deadline to submit transcripts for domestic students applying for the Winter 2027 intake of the Practical Nurse Diploma program.

title: Student Visa Deadline
description: Deadline to submit student visa approval or denial for Spring 2026 international applicants.

title: Withdrawal Deadline
description: Last day to withdraw from Winter 2026 courses without academic penalty.

title: Good Friday
description: College closed for Good Friday and Easter Monday statutory holidays. No classes or services April 3 to 6.

title: Easter Monday
description: College closed for Good Friday and Easter Monday statutory holidays. No classes or services April 3 to 6.

title: International Applications Close
description: International applications close for Spring 2026. Some programs may close earlier if waitlists are full.

title: Application to Graduate Deadline
description: Deadline to submit your Application to Graduate for the Spring 2026 convocation.

title: End of Winter Term
description: End of the Winter 2026 term. Spring 2026 domestic post-secondary applications close at 4:00 p.m. MT.

title: New Student Orientation
description: New Student Orientation for Spring 2026. Join us over three days to get set up, meet your peers, and prepare for a successful semester at BVC.

title: Tuition & Fees Deadline
description: Deadline to pay tuition and fees for the Spring 2026 term. Late payments may result in deregistration from courses.

title: Start of Spring Term
description: First day of classes for the Spring 2026 term. Welcome back to campus!

title: Application to Graduate Opens
description: The Application to Graduate opens for eligible students. Submit your application before the deadline to be considered for the next convocation.

title: Course Drop & Transfer Credit Deadline
description: Last day to drop courses and submit transfer credit. Also the deadline to opt out of the Calgary Transit UPass for Spring 2026.

title: Intl. Applications Open – Spring 2027
description: Applications open for international students applying to post-secondary programs for the Spring 2027 intake.

title: College Closed – Victoria Day
description: College closed for the Victoria Day statutory holiday. No classes or services.

title: Graduation Conferral
description: Spring 2026 Graduation Conferral Date. Degrees, diplomas, and certificates are officially conferred for eligible graduates.

title: Academic Upgrading Applications Open
description: Applications open for Academic Upgrading, English for Academic Purposes, and Regional Open Studies programs.

title: Domestic Applications Open – Spring 2027
description: Applications open for domestic students applying to post-secondary programs for Spring 2027. Health & Wellness students also begin self-registration.

title: SABVC Health Plan Opt-Out Deadline
description: Last day to opt out of the SABVC Health and Dental plan and My Virtual Doctor (MVD) plan for the Spring 2026 term.

title: Application to Graduate Deadline
description: Final deadline to submit your Application to Graduate for the Spring 2026 convocation ceremonies.

title: Spring Convocation Ceremonies
description: Spring 2026 Convocation Ceremonies celebrating the graduating class. Join us to recognize the achievements of our students across all programs.

title: College Closed – Canada Day
description: College closed for Canada Day. No classes or services.

title: Reading Week
description: Reading Week for Spring 2026. Credit classes do not meet, except Practical Nurse classes. Condensed and continuing courses follow their own schedules.

title: PN Diploma Applications Close
description: Applications close for domestic students applying for the Spring 2027 intake of the Practical Nurse Diploma program.

title: Open Studies Applications Open
description: Applications for Open Studies open for the Fall 2026 intake.

title: Intl. Visa Deadline – Fall 2026
